name: MSI MAG FORGE M100A FIX RGB
highlights: MAG FORGE M100A Micro ATX Tower Case offers a compact yet powerful foundation for your next gaming or productivity build
Compatible with Micro-ATX and Mini-ITX motherboards, it supports up to a 300mm GPU and a 160mm CPU cooler

Featuring 4 pre-installed Auto-RGB fans, versatile radiator support, and ample airflow options, the M100A combines striking aesthetics with efficient cooling—perfect for gamers and PC enthusiasts looking for performance in a small form factor
